title: polygala lusitanica
intro: Polygala lusitanica, also known as Lusitanian knapweed, is a plant species within the Polygalaceae family, native to Portugal and western Spain. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Polygala lusitanica include its ability to soothe and calm the respiratory system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of asthma. Herbal preparations of Polygala lusitanica can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to relieve respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
